panel.title: Volumen de eventos por fuente (picos de trafico)

search.query: index=proxylogon sourcetype IN (iis, windows_events_proxylogon, json_otrf_real) | timechart span=30m count by sourcetype

index=proxylogon sourcetype=iis (cs_uri_stem="*autodiscover*" OR cs_uri_stem="*/ecp/*") (cs_uri_query="*@*" OR cs_Cookie="*X-AnonResource-Backend*" OR cs_Cookie="*X-BEResource*") | lookup hafnium_ips src_ip AS c_ip OUTPUT isBad AS ip_conocida_hafnium | search ip_conocida_hafnium=TRUE | dedup _time c_ip cs_uri_stem | stats count
index=proxylogon sourcetype=windows_events_proxylogon EventCode=4688 ParentProcessName="*w3wp.exe*" | dedup CommandLine | stats count
index=proxylogon sourcetype=windows_events_proxylogon EventCode=4104 ScriptBlockText="*New-MailboxExportRequest*" | dedup ScriptBlockText | stats count
index=proxylogon sourcetype=windows_events_proxylogon EventCode=10 TargetProcessName="*lsass.exe*" | dedup SourceProcessName TargetProcessName | stats count
index=proxylogon sourcetype=iis c_ip!="203.0.113.77" | top limit=10 c_ip
